## Problem

Describe the problem this feature would solve. What are you trying to do that you currently cannot?

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

What alternative solutions or workarounds have you considered?

## Acceptance criteria

What does "done" look like for this feature? List specific, testable criteria.

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Additional context

Any mockups, references to similar products, or other context.
